products.title: Anker 737 Power Bank (PowerCore 24K)
products.description: High-capacity 24,000mAh portable charger with 140W output, smart digital display, and rapid charging for laptops, tablets, and phones. Perfect for travel and work on the go.

products.title: Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Noise Canceling Headphones
products.description: Industry-leading noise cancellation with 30-hour battery life, crystal-clear hands-free calling, and premium comfort for all-day wear.

products.title: Logitech MX Master 3S Wireless Mouse
products.description: Ergonomic wireless mouse with 8K DPI sensor, ultra-fast scrolling, and USB-C charging. The ultimate productivity tool for professionals.
